name: vote_transaction
description: A vote-program instruction observed during transaction execution.  Captures the on-the-wire vote contents (tower, bank hash being voted for, voter) at processing time, regardless of whether the transaction ultimately succeeds.

voter.description: First signer of the transaction, typically the authorized voter (32 bytes)

bank_hash.description: Bank hash being voted for (32 bytes)

block_id.description: Block id being voted for (zeros if not present, e.g. legacy variants) (32 bytes)

slot.description: Bank slot in which this instruction is being processed

root_slot.description: Root slot in the vote (0 if has_root=false)

vote_timestamp.description: Vote timestamp in unix seconds (0 if has_timestamp=false)

has_block_id.description: 1 if block_id is meaningful (tower_sync variants), 0 otherwise

tower.description: Tower of slots being voted on (newest at end)

slot.description: Slot being voted on / locked out for

signature.description: First signature of the transaction containing this vote ix (64 bytes)
